title: Androgen receptor-negative prostate cancer is vulnerable to SWI/SNF-targeting degrader molecules
author: Benjak, Andrej
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
WCM1078 cell line treated with a PROTAC targeting SMARCA2 and SMARCA4. A947: active compound A858: inactive compound (control) 
 scRNA folder also includes MSK-PCa16 cell line.
